violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. -Bacon stored in drawers above drawers of bagged breads (visible bacon pieces in bottom draw with bread). -Flat of raw, whole shell eggs stored on top of prep table on top of containers of Deli meat and condiments.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Residue at handles of 2 door glass cooler. -Steam well has lime scale at interior and food splatter at exterior surfaces. -Splatter at interior surfaces and handles of microwave. -Residue at exterior surface of containers of pancake powder and breading flour. -Dust/debris at walk in cooler fans.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Grease residue build up at hood vent above griddle and at back surface of hood surround.

Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. -Ran out of Chlorine test strips, stated they should be getting some in today.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Case of single use lids stored on floor in back room--Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Spoons at self serve ice cream station are not all faced one direction.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Build up of grease debris at walls behind cook line. -Splatter/residue at walls behind steam well and pizza ovens.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not maintained in good repair. -Floors have worn paint and grease residue throughout kitchen. -Walk in cooler floors are damaged and rusty throughout.
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Method, temperature and time (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Thermometers provided, used, clean, and accurate (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
